info.title: Shiptheory API
info.description: Shiptheory provides a REST API that allows you to communicate directly with all supported carriers. This API covers creating and searching shipments, printing shipping labels and return labels, as well as returning lists of available delivery services and package sizes.

post.description: Use your Shiptheory email and password to request a bearer token. Tokens expire after 60 minutes.
Add a shipment to Shiptheory and book it with a carrier.

get.description: Retrieve the status, created and last modified datetime, tracking number and label data of an existing shipment. Shipping label PDFs are returned as a base64 encoded string.

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: The unique reference used when creating the shipment

get.description: Search shipments in a Shiptheory account by specifying GET parameters. Supports pagination with max 100 results per page.

parameters.name: modified
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD. The shipment last modified date

get.description: Search shipments with date range filters. Max date range is 365 days.

parameters.name: include_products
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include product data

post.description: Download a picking list PDF for specified shipments.
Create a return label from an existing shipment. Address, order and product data are taken from the existing shipment.

get.description: Search return shipments. Max date range is 365 days. Supports pagination with max 100 results per page.

parameters.name: tracking_numbers
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of shipment tracking numbers

get.description: Returns a list of outgoing delivery services available on your Shiptheory account.
Returns a list of incoming (return) delivery services available on your Shiptheory account.
Returns a list of the package sizes set up on your Shiptheory account. Supports pagination.

post.description: Add a single product with a unique SKU to your Shiptheory account.

get.description: Returns a list of products in your account. Supports pagination with max 100 results per page.
Returns a single product based on the SKU.

put.description: Update a single product by SKU.

get.description: Get a list of couriers which can be used in rating requests.

200.description: List of couriers available for rating

post.description: Get live rates from multiple couriers. This action does not add shipments to Shiptheory's database.

get.description: Get a single tag by ID.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token obtained from POST /token. Tokens expire after 60 minutes.

category.description: Dangerous goods category, defaults to LQDG

is_accessible.description: Whether goods need to be accessible on aircraft (IATA)

weight.description: Weight in kilograms, to three decimal places

expiry.description: Label expiry date (max 30 days from now)

delivery_services.description: Map of carrier names to their services

return_services.description: Map of carrier names to their return services

error.description: Error details - can be a string or object with field-specific errors
